config.title: #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "50560"
#comment '------------------------------------------ #comment ' budowa tablicy z wartosciami pola enum (elemtny typu BOWI) #comment '------------------------------------------
function nx_create_enum_bowi_array(byval iTypeId,byval strField,byval strFilter,byval bPositiveFilter) dim oBOWIArray : set oBOWIArray = nx_.new_array() dim oBOWI
dim oStdObjDef: set oStdObjDef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(iTypeId) dim oFieldDef : set oFieldDef = oStdObjDef.field(oStdObjDef.getfieldindex(strField)) dim iter : iter = 0 dim oFilterArray : set oFilterArray = nx_.new_array()
dim bApplyFilter : bApplyFilter = false if strFilter <> "" then oFilterArray.split_string strFilter,";" bApplyFilter = true end if
do while (oFieldDef.enumvalue(iter) <> "") dim bFound : bFound = not bApplyFilter or (oFilterArray.find(cstr(iter+1)) <> -1) if (bFound and bPositiveFilter) or (not bFound and not bPositiveFilter) then set oBOWI = nx_.new_bowi(0,iter + 1,oFieldDef.enumvalue(iter),nothing) oBOWIArray.add oBOWI end if iter = iter + 1 loop
set nx_create_enum_bowi_array = oBOWIArray end function
function nx_choose_enum_value(byval strTitle, byval iTypeId , byval strField,byval strFilter,byval bPositiveFilter) dim oBOWIArray : set oBOWIArray = nx_create_enum_bowi_array(iTypeId,strField,strFilter,bPositiveFilter) if oBOWIArray.count = 1 then nx_choose_enum_value = oBOWIArray(0).m_iIdObj else oBOWIArray.sort nx_choose_enum_value = nx_fire_array_choice_list(0,strTitle,"Wartość", oBOWIArray) end if end function
'--------- old entry: OBSOLETE: check calls and remove if none --------- function choose_enum_item(byval strTitle , byval iTypeId , byval strField, byval strFilter , byval bPositiveFilter) choose_enum_item = nx_choose_enum_value(strTitle,iTypeId,strField,strFilter,bPositiveFilter) end function
